The architecture assessment identified 2 executive-level risk items, with 1 requiring immediate attention and 1 at high priority. The primary risk area is Identity Risk, with 1 related findings. Additional risk areas include Data Protection Risk. The architecture demonstrates foundational security controls. However, the identified risk areas represent elevated concerns that may affect sensitive data protection, regulatory readiness, and operational resilience. Financial exposure is classified as Moderate, warranting board-level awareness and prioritization.
